mainTitle: Reference and broadcast all your events
mainSubtitle: Optimize cost and improve your events visibility
mainDescription: OpenAgenda is a powerful calendar tool used by diverse actors like the Centre Pompidou museum, the Ministry of Culture, Nuit Debout and the region of Ile de France.
mainConnectMedia: more than **a hundred medias** like le Parisien, Ouest France, ViaFrance & TootSweet
mainConnectServices: third-party services like WeMap and OpenDataSoft
mainConnectPersonal: personal calendars like Google Calendar, Outlook, Thunderbird, Lotus Notes
mainBroadcastTitle: The events of your agenda or network is available for broadcast
mainBroadcastText: Your events are broadcast on agendas of the platform as well as with our partners
mainBroadcastPoint1: Your events are **structured** following an international standard
mainBroadcastPoint2: They can be aggregated in other agendas
mainBroadcastPoint3: They are available for reuse by more than a hundred media, including Le Parisien, Ouest France, ViaFrance or TootSweet
mainBroadcastPoint4: They are embeddable in your **[your website](/discover/your-website)**
mainBETitle: Are you organizing a big event ?
mainBEPoint4: Display your agenda on your site
mainBEPoint5: Export on all your channels: newsletter, paper, etc.
mainBEPoint6: Get privileged access to a dedicated support contact
mainPricingAgendaPoint1: Launch now the calendar of your location, exhibition, festival, organization.
mainPricingAgendaPoint2: The cost is proportional to the degree of customization
mainPricingAgendaPoint3: **Example of users** : Théâtre la Loge, ReedExpo, Salon de l’agriculture, Fête De la Science, Semaine de l'industrie
mainPricingNetworkPoint1: You animate a territory, a federation, several local coordinators ? The network of agendas is for you.
mainPricingNetworkPoint2: The pricing is proportional to the size of your network.
mainPricingNetworkPoint3: **Example of users**: INA, Bordeaux Métropole, Journées Européennes du Patrimoine.
agendaPricingPresTitle: Efficiently manage from the smallest to the largest collaborative agenda
agendaPricingPresPoint1: Your event pages are detailed and you can organize your calendar with multiple criteria.
agendaPricingPresPoint2: Regardless of your staff size, your calendar fits your context
agendaPricingPresPoint3: Sync your calendar with your mediums and share it with the whole world as #OpenData.
agendaPricingFreeFeature3: Standard event fields + one custom field
agendaPriceCustomFeature2: Bounded contribution dates, locations and contributors
agendaPricingNetwork: Do you need to manage several agendas?
agendaPricingNetworkDetail: Agenda Networks enable you to manage a multitude of interconnected agendas
networkPricingDescription: Pricing for a network of agendas
networkPricingPresText:
You coordinate a federation ? A territory ?
Deploy a network of agendas and aggregate all your events in real-time
networkHowMany: You do not know how many events you manage per year ? We do.
basicOfferHeadDescription: Create a participative agenda for free to better broadcast your events
basicOfferDescription: Create as many agendas as you want, they are free and always will be
unlimitedEvents: Create and manage as many events as you need in any agenda
unlimitedMembers: Manage your agenda on your own or mobilize a community around a common agenda
unlimitedDownloads: Save, syncronize, export and broadcast your events in all useful formats
openDataDownload: Available in csv, xls, rss, ics, xml, json
openDataReuse: reusable by our partners and all interested third-parties
multimediaEvents: Multimedia descriptions: add videos, soundtracks and images
multimediaEventsGeo: Rich geocoding: type the address and all localization details are retrieved: latitude, longitude, region, country...
broadcastHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Type one entry for multiple re-uses
broadcastHeadDescription: Your events are reusable and reused throughout the internet
broadcastTitle: Type one entry for multiple re-uses
broadcastText: Export your agenda on multiple mediums:
premiumOfferHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - The premium agenda: a fully featured contributive agenda
startWithFree: You get all the features from an Open Agenda, plus...
customizedTitle: Customize event forms to meet your specific needs
customizedChoice: Add fields of any type, required or not, private or public
customizedExportable: Export all your data any time in any format
boundariesTime: Specify the period covered by your agenda
boundariesContribution: Limit contribution to invited members only
boundariesLocation: Limit contribution to a predefined list of locations
customEmbedTitle: Fully customize your agenda integration in your website
customEmbed: Display a white-label agenda on your site
customEmbedSearch: Get all OpenAgenda search features directly on your website
customEmbedFeatured: Choose which information to put forward on your website
customEmbedTemplates: Our template engine will give you full control over customization (HTML / CSS)
validationProcessTitle: Get more out of your event validation process
validationProcessDetail: Your events are either __to be moderated__, __ready to be published__ or __published__
moderatorTitle: Name moderators to review contributions on your agenda
moderatorRights: Moderators can review and bring changes to contributions
moderatorTweaks: Decide if moderators have publish rights over the events
networkOfferDescription: Deploy a network of interconnected agendas
networkTitle: You manage an organization, a federation, a territory comprising of a multitude of independent organizers ?
networkInterconnected: Deploy a network of interconnected agendas
networkEvolving: Get the benefits of an online specialized solution in constant evolution
networkPremium: Get an unlimited number of free agendas plus **20 premium agendas**
networkExport: The events of your networks can be exported in a unified interface
supportBoard: Get a personal support through a dedicated ticket board
supportLaunch: Get a one-to-one conversation at the start of your project to start on the right foot
tailoredHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - A tailored offer for your event management and communication needs
tailoredDescription: A tailored offer to match your event network needs
expertiseTitle: The OpenAgenda team can intervene at several levels in your project
portalTitle: A website dedicated to your event content
portalTailored: A hosted website tailored for your brand
portalSearch: All search features available on OpenAgenda
portalContent: Content managed and moderated by the team
collaborateHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Collaborate over large event datasets
collaborateDescription: Thanks to contributive agendas, manage thousands of events with your team of collaborators
stakeholderTitle: Invite contributors and administrators to collaborate on your agenda
stakeholderInvitation: Your agenda can be open to all contributions or be limited to a set of invited contributors
stakeholderInfo: Get details on your contributors such as contact number, role and organization name
buildNetworkDescription: Whether your organization is a region, an association, a company with multiple branches, a network of agendas will allow you to get a holistic view of all your events.
buildNetworkHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Build a network of agendas
exportsTitle: Make your events available in all file and export formats
exportsReuse: Events are re-used by third-party platforms as well as other OpenAgendas
exportsNetworkable: Your content can be broadcast within a parent network such as a city or region a parent company or specialized media
exportsBroadcastDescription: Your events are reusable and reused throughout the internet
privateTitle: Do you want to limit access to your Agenda?
privateVisibility: Private agendas are only visible to chosen identified users
reportingToolHeadTitle: OpenAgenda - Use a contributive agenda for reporting your specialized event data
reportingToolDescription: Define private and public custom fields and download all data in one click
paolaScottonTestimony: The ideal solution to centralize all information related to a common event. The platform is very intuitive and simple to used, it keeps all its promises.
virginieStaelsTestimony: We organized a nationwide operation, where nearly 100 contributors published events in our OpenAgenda calendar. In the end, the feedback praised the ease of use and stability of the agenda. The solution contributed largely to the success of our ministry's project!
virginieStaelsOrganization:
Ministry of National Education,
Higher Education and Research
jeromeMessinaTestimony: OpenAgenda is becoming the reference tool in France. The interface is intuitive and offers numerous features. We use it today for all our national events ( European Heritage Days, Fête de la Musique, European Museum Night, etc).
anneLaureJanvierTestimony: I chose OpenAgenda as it matched exactly to our requirements: unify in a single interface all animations with detailed timings and locations. The platform allows us to configure once an event spreading over multiple days.
xavierMasclauxTestimony: We needed to create collaborative calendars with our partners dedicated to events in the digital, innovation and coworking fields. OpenAgenda allowed us to gain time by allowing us to mutualize our events and broadcast them more globally via our websites and beyond
contactDescription: Give us a call or right a note, we will get back to you shortly
testimoniesHeadDescription: Find out what our clients say about OpenAgenda
basicSumIntegration: Embeddable in any website or Facebook page
basicSumBroadcast: Events are reusable by our and your partners
premiumSumAggregation: Aggregate events from other agendas into yours
premiumSumTemplating: Advanced customization for your embedded agenda
embedDescription: Embed your white-labelled OpenAgenda in your site
embedDiscover: Discover a selection of embedded agendas
